# Simple test script for checking that the GitHub repo cloned correctly
```{r}
message("Repository cloned successfully into RStudio.")
```

```{r}
project_name <- "ACTL4003 Mesothelioma Project"
today <- Sys.Date()
```

```{r}
test_summary <- data.frame(
  project = project_name,
  date_opened = today
)
print(test_summary)
```
